message: ci: enable pnpm before setup-node caching

files.patch:
@@ -27,14 +27,14 @@ jobs: # Single top-level jobs key
     steps:
       - name: Checkout code
         uses: actions/checkout@v6
+      - name: Enable pnpm
+        run: corepack enable pnpm
       - name: Set up Node.js ${{ matrix.node-version }}
         uses: actions/setup-node@v6
         with:
           node-version: ${{ matrix.node-version }}
           cache: 'pnpm'
           cache-dependency-path: pnpm-lock.yaml
-      - name: Enable pnpm
-        run: corepack enable pnpm
       - name: Install dependencies
         run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
       - name: Build project
@@ -51,14 +51,14 @@ jobs: # Single top-level jobs key
     steps:
     - name: Checkout code
       uses: actions/checkout@v6
+    - name: Enable pnpm
+      run: corepack enable pnpm
     - name: Use Node.js ${{ matrix.node-version }}
       uses: actions/setup-node@v6
       with:
         node-version: ${{ matrix.node-version }}
         cache: 'pnpm'
         cache-dependency-path: pnpm-lock.yaml
-    - name: Enable pnpm
-      run: corepack enable pnpm
     - name: Install dependencies
       run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
     - name: Lint
@@ -81,14 +81,14 @@ jobs: # Single top-level jobs key
     steps:
       - name: Checkout code
         uses: actions/checkout@v6
+      - name: Enable pnpm
+        run: corepack enable pnpm
       - name: Set up Node.js
         uses: actions/setup-node@v6
         with:
           node-version: '20.x' # Using a specific Node version for consistency
           cache: 'pnpm'
           cache-dependency-path: pnpm-lock.yaml
-      - name: Enable pnpm
-        run: corepack enable pnpm
       - name: Install dependencies
         run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
       - name: Validate Knowledge Base

@@ -9,15 +9,14 @@ jobs:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v6
+      - name: Enable pnpm
+        run: corepack enable pnpm
       - uses: actions/setup-node@v6
         with:
           node-version: '20.x'
           registry-url: 'https://registry.npmjs.org'
           cache: 'pnpm'
           cache-dependency-path: pnpm-lock.yaml
-
-      - name: Enable pnpm
-        run: corepack enable pnpm
       
       - name: Install dependencies
         run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
